---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new component or feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature or component you'd like.

## Use Case
Explain the problem this would solve or the app type it benefits.

## Proposed Solution
How you'd expect it to work (API, props, behavior).

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, links to similar implementations, etc.
